sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10788" key="a)ntria/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντριάς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀντραῖος, Νύμφαι ἀ.</foreign> <sense id="n10788.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">grot</tr_>-Nymphs, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.224</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theodorid.</author> </bibl>), cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:p.27B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PS</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.27B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
